message:
fix(tokio-compat): fix test compilation for hyper_bridge and io modules (asupersync-2oh2u.7.4)

Add missing trait imports (hyper::rt::Timer, tokio::io::AsyncRead) in test
modules and add type annotations for Vec<u8> inference failures.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
